title: Source: Elastic agrees to buy CRV-backed DeductiveAI for up to $85M
slides: Elastic just paid $85M for an AI startup. Why?
DeductiveAI built software for root cause analysis.
It automates finding why a server failed.
Elastic will embed this into its observability tools.
Your ops team can now debug logs instantly.
thread_text:
1. Elastic paid $85M for what?

DeductiveAI’s software automates root cause analysis for server failures.

2. What does it actually do?

It finds why a server crashed by scanning logs automatically.

3. Where will this go?

Elastic will embed it into their observability tools for real-time use.

4. What does that mean for you?

Your ops team can debug logs instantly without manual searching.

5. Test it on a real log file today.

Does your team currently spend hours finding root causes? Try the workflow now.
video_script: Elastic just spent 85 million on an AI startup.

It scans logs and gives root cause answers.
Elastic will put this into its observability tools.
Your ops team now debugs logs instantly.

script: Elastic just spent 85 million on an AI startup.
DeductiveAI automates finding why servers fail.
It scans logs and gives root cause answers.
Elastic will put this into its observability tools.
Your ops team now debugs logs instantly.

instagram.caption:
$85M for a startup that finds why your server crashed—automatically.

DeductiveAI built software that scans logs to pinpoint root causes in seconds 🖥️. Elastic is embedding it into their tools, so ops teams can debug without manual searches.

Your work: less time digging through error logs, more time fixing the actual problem ⚡.

Is your team still spending hours guessing why production broke?
